criteria.name: functional_correctness
evidence: Confirmed branch codex/f000-harness-foundation and clean pre-evaluation working tree.
Confirmed .gitattributes exists and git attributes set text/eol=lf for harness files and scripts.
Confirmed scripts/init.sh, scripts/init.ps1, scripts/smoke.sh, and scripts/smoke.ps1 exist.
Git Bash init and smoke scripts passed and validated required harness files plus agent-state JSON.
PowerShell init and smoke scripts passed under PowerShell 7.6.3.
Invoked scripts from C:\tmp using absolute paths; scripts resolved C:\repos\freetier-atlas from their own locations.
Smoke scripts reported application scaffold checks as pending F002 and did not claim product health.
Temporary copied fixtures confirmed missing-file and invalid-JSON failures are actionable.

criteria.name: product_depth
evidence: F000 is a harness feature; no display-only product workflow or fake application success path was introduced.
Smoke scripts explicitly report that application scaffold checks are pending F002.

criteria.name: data_integrity
evidence: JSON validation passed for agent-state/feature_list.json, agent-state/current_contract.json, and agent-state/evaluation.json before evaluator updates.
Negative JSON validation used temporary copied fixtures and did not corrupt active repository state.

criteria.name: zero_cost_safety
evidence: No service-free claim, hosting change, deployment, provider integration, or paid dependency was introduced.

criteria.name: security_privacy
evidence: Static scans found no environment-dump commands and no network-call commands in scripts.
Scripts print only deterministic check status and repository root, not environment variables or secrets.

criteria.name: portability
evidence: Shell scripts use BASH_SOURCE[0] to resolve the repository root.
PowerShell scripts use PSCommandPath to resolve the repository root and re-run under pwsh when available.
Native Windows bash is unavailable because WSL has no installed distribution; recorded as unavailable, while Git Bash passed.

criteria.name: code_quality
evidence: git diff main...HEAD --check passed.
Scripts are focused on F000 harness checks and avoid application scaffolding.
Changed paths are limited to .gitattributes, agent-state contract/progress/evaluation/feature ledger, and scripts.

criteria.name: user_experience
evidence: Script output uses clear status lines and actionable error messages for missing files and invalid JSON.

criteria.name: regression_safety
evidence: Pre-evaluation tree was clean.
No application or product implementation files were added.
Required command suite completed except native bash, which is unavailable on this host and was recorded as unavailable rather than passed.

commands_run: git check-attr --all -- .gitattributes AGENTS.md agent-state/current_contract.json scripts/init.sh scripts/smoke.sh scripts/init.ps1 scripts/smoke.ps1
rg product-scaffolding patterns in changed F000 paths
python -c JSON validation for all three agent-state JSON files
Temporary copied fixture missing-file negative test
Temporary copied fixture invalid-JSON negative test
end_to_end_steps_run: Read required agent instructions, harness docs, feature ledger, current contract, evaluation state, progress log, and builder commit diff.
Ran canonical initialization and smoke scripts through Git Bash and PowerShell.
Verified script-root behavior by invoking scripts from outside the repository.
Verified negative failure behavior using copied temporary fixtures only.
Confirmed app scaffold health remains pending F002 and was not faked.
recommendations: Push codex/f000-harness-foundation and open a PR.
In the next feature, keep native bash availability documented for Windows hosts where bash is only the WSL launcher.
